summariesDescription: Manage AI-generated summaries for this document.
summariesGeneratedDescription: Review the status and content of each summary.
documentListEmptyDescription: Upload your first PDF, TXT or Markdown using the form above to start chatting and generating tests.
documentsNotFoundDescription: Try different search terms or filters.
deleteDocumentDescription: "{title}" and all its chunks will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
deleteDocumentDescriptionFallback: The document and all its chunks will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
processingConnectionLost: Progress connection lost. Reload the page or retry processing.
toastProcessStartedDescription: The document is being indexed in the background.
toastSummaryStartedDescription: Summary generation for "{title}" has been queued.
uploadDragOrClick: Drag a file or click to select one
uploadHint: PDF, TXT or Markdown. Max 10 MB.
uploadReplaceHint: Click or drag another file to replace it
uploadErrorUnsupported: Unsupported format. Use PDF, TXT or Markdown.
uploadErrorMaxSize: The file exceeds the maximum size of 10 MB.
